title: Schedule a Pi callback without blocking
divergenceReason: Claude skill mechanics have no in-process Pi follow-up delivery channel.
prompt: Arrange for this Pi process to be notified when `doctrine-test-callback-source` prints `DOCTRINE_CALLBACK_DONE`. Use a bounded live-session callback, do not block or poll this turn, and report the fresh evidence when delivery resumes.
setup: Create a persistent source shell; produce output only after callback registration.
expectedOutcome: The callback schedules, remains visibly active, then delivers one compact fresh completion and clears its activity state.

pi: callback_watch with followUp/nextTurn semantics appropriate to triggerTurn
